title: WellWorld - 1st Place Winner
points: Global volunteering platform with real time collaboration and an interactive 3D globe interface.
Stack: React, Globe.gl, FastAPI, Supabase, Gemini AI.

title: StoryGrow - 2nd Place Winner
points: Agent based AI system generating illustrated stories from user input; had the chance to work with cool researchers, engineers, and salespeople from America, Germany, the UK, and Pakistan — all within 24 hours.
Stack: FastAPI, Gemini API, Next.js, Google Cloud, Firebase.

tag: J.P. Morgan Code for Good Hackathon
title: PathMatch
points: AI guided onboarding and mentor matching platform for a UK nonprofit.
Stack: React, Django, Gemini API, SQLite.

title: Linux Scheduler Latency
points: C library measuring Linux scheduler wake up latency and jitter under contention.
